issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (DON!! cards on field), not 'HasRestingDon' (resting DON!! cards). 'HasRestingDon' refers to resting state, not presence on field.
Target must specify 'upTo:2' to reflect 'up to 2' limit in card text. Current target lacks quantity constraint.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect for 'during this turn' text. Should be 'DuringYourTurn' to match the scope of the effect within the current turn.
